title: The Secret (The Adventures Of Seumas Beg)
content:
I was frightened, for a wind
            Crept along the grass to say
        Something that was in my mind
            Yesterday, 

        Something that I did not know
            Could be found out by the wind,
        I had buried it so low
            In my mind.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Stephens delivers a powerful performance in "The Secret (The Adventures Of Seumas Beg)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
